decoder.rle: byte <= 0x7F writes one tile; byte > 0x7F writes (byte & 0x7F) repeated next byte count

0x00.name: rock
evidence: asset extracted from KIT.BIN:$D218-$D257
visual validation diff 0/256 against functional port oracle
KIT.BIN:$CB17 treats 0x00 as a falling object
KIT.BIN:$BC84 allows 0x00 movement/push behavior

0x01.name: earth
evidence: most frequent level tile
visual tile is green filled terrain
not yet tied to a dedicated collision/scoring routine

0x02.name: monster
evidence: KIT.BIN:$DA10 handles 0x02 specially and records its grid address
KIT.BIN:$CC5B checks 0x02 against the special-position table
KIT.BIN:$D1BB animates 0x02 by complementing its shape plane bytes $D298-$D2B7

0x03.name: diamond
evidence: visual tile is the diamond sprite in the extracted atlas
KIT.BIN:$CB17 treats 0x03 as a falling object like 0x00
present in level grids with counts matching collectible placement

0x04.name: exit_block
evidence: level header bytes at +6/+7 are stored in $DBB3/$DBB4 by KIT.BIN:$DA10
KIT.BIN:$BEA7-$BEB6 converts $DBB3/$DBB4 into the exit grid pointer
KIT.BIN:$BFB6 writes tileId 0x04 at the exit pointer $DBB3
KIT.BIN:$BFE2 compares the player pointer $D034 with the exit pointer $DBB3 to trigger level progression
tileId 0x04 also appears as level block data, so the role is exit block / protected block rather than a unique marker

0x05.name: empty
evidence: visual tile is black empty space
KIT.BIN:$CB3B/$CBA7 move falling objects into cells equal to 0x05
KIT.BIN:$BD03/$BD2E/$BD4C/$BD68 require neighbor 0x05 for movement

0x06.name: green_platform
evidence: visual tile is a green block/platform
KIT.BIN:$CB3B treats 0x06 as a support/interaction case
needs collision role confirmation in phase 3 follow-up or gameplay tests

0x17.name: special_target
evidence: KIT.BIN:$DA10 branches to KIT.BIN:$BC07 when decoding 0x17
KIT.BIN:$BC07 records the grid address and stores 0x02 marker metadata
KIT.BIN:$CC57 checks 0x17 against the related special-position table
appears in decoded levels or generated atlas, no role proof yet
